title: Aza-heteroaryl compounds as pi3k-gamma inhibitors
abstract: The present invention provides aza-heteroaryl derivatives of Formula I: and pharmaceutically acceptable salts thereof, wherein X, Y, Z, A, W, R 4 , R 5 , and R 6 are defined herein, that inhibit the activity of phosphoinositide 3-kinases-gamma (PI3KÏ) and are useful in the treatment of diseases related to the activity of PI3KÏ including, for example, autoimmune diseases, cancer, cardiovascular diseases, and neurodegenerative diseases.
